completion_contract.partial: At least one useful method-produced artifact exists, but a full requirement is missing.
completion_contract.smoke: Only setup, import, parse, or other non-deck native stage completed.
completion_contract.blocked: No method-produced artifact; a named preflight, infrastructure, provider, or budget gate prevented execution.

provider_rate_card.reason: CMU WInE aliases do not expose a frozen project rate card or per-run usage ledger.

budget_policy.compute_accounting: Record Slurm resources and elapsed time separately; do not misreport institutional compute as USD 0.

papers.title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
Trust the Batch, On- or Off-Policy: Adaptive Policy Optimization for RL Post-Training
RoFormer: Enhanced Transformer with Rotary Position Embedding

pipelines.selection_reason: Current reflective, environment-grounded presenter path; explicitly excludes pptagent_legacy.
pipelines.known_preflight: Requires the documented sandbox/host runtime, browser conversion surface, and model configuration.

pipelines.selection_reason: Specialized multi-agent paper-to-PPTX pipeline with formula and figure mapping.
pipelines.known_preflight: Vendored Docling requires docling-parse<=4.7.3 API; unconstrained install selected incompatible 5.2.0.

pipelines.selection_reason: Narrative discourse-tree and commitment-planning approach diversifies the planning layer despite acknowledged SlideGen visual ancestry.
pipelines.known_preflight: Broad unpinned requirements and no release/tag; full run must use this exact commit and captured environment.

pipelines.selection_reason: Declared fallback only if ArcDeck cannot complete the controlled pilot or backend independence becomes decisive.
pipelines.known_preflight: Text planning works through WInE; configured Gemini endpoint does not support image output.
